title: Nora's Truck Stop
description: A mod which adds several building blocks themed around the 1980s and 1990s.
body:
# Nora's Truck Stop
With 36 blocks (and their variants!) to offer, Nora's Truck Stop is an incredible pick for builders of the 80's and 90's style.

## This mod adds:
- Three extra variants of brick
- Eleven variants of shingles
- Velvet cushions and lemon velvet cushions
- Arcade carpeting (textured by duckamoly!)
- Beige and white corrugated metal with doors, trapdoors, windows, and decorated variants
- Vinyl wood
- Cardboard box
- Garage door panels
- Thirteen variants of drywall
